biological_replicate: HT29 and MCF7 cells obtained from the ATCC
technical_replicate: The results were analyzed in triplicate injections.
experimental_design: Using HT29 cells endogenous TFEB translocated to the nucleus on glucose deprivation.
factor_value: the TFEB NES integrates carbon (glucose) and nitrogen (amino acid) availability...
number_of_biological_replicates: HT29 and MCF7 cells obtained from the ATCC
number_of_samples: 2 biological replicates (cell lines) and 1 fraction = 2 total samples.
